rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (6/10) and surface the same substantive concerns — limited/non-recent C++ experience and no capital markets or fixed income experience. The wording differs slightly (e.g., 'multiple' vs 'various' programming languages, 'good understanding of software craftsmanship' as a strength), but these are reworded restatements of the same assessment, well within ordinary run-to-run noise. Nothing in the variant references location, nationality, or any signal tied to the Berlin-to-Lagos change.
